awesomeListMeta.descriptionHTML: 🕶️ A curated list of resources around the topic: visual regression testing
awesomeListMeta.description: 🕶️ A curated list of resources around the topic: visual regression testing

nodes.itemHTML: • UI Visual Regression Testing with Micoo - Introduction about how to do visual regression testing with Micoo service
• Poor man's visual regression testing - Improved manual visual regression testing with the PerfectPixel chrome plugin.

• BugBug.io - Lightweight test automation tool for web applications. Easy to learn and doesn't require coding. It's free, with unlimited tests. For an additional monthly fee, you also get cloud monitoring and CI/CD integration.

• Meticulous.ai - Easily create frontend tests without writing code. Use Meticulous to record workflows on your web app. You can then replay those flows on new frontend code, and create a test by diffing two replays.
• Toucastars108 - Open source continuous regression testing without the hassle of managing snapshot files.
• Preflight - Easiest Visual regression testing and Automated Web Testing tool. (Limited) free use.
• Preflight: Cypress Recorder - Create AI-powered Cypress Tests/POM models in your browser and automate Email & Visual testing for Cypress.
• Cypress in 100 Seconds - Introduction video by Fireship.
• HeadSpin - HeadSpin's Regression testing gives you a powerful comparison tool for analysing degradation across new app builds, OS releases, feature additions, locations, and more.
• TestingBot - Provides +3600 browsers to run automated visual tests. Free for Open Source.
• jest-image-snapshotstars3.5k - Jest matcher that performs image comparisons using pixelmatch
• Visual regression testing using Jest, Chromeless and AWS Lambdastars17 - Tutorial using Chromeless and jest-image-snapshot.
• OSnapstars107 - The speedy and easy to use Snapshot Testing tool for your project (1200 snapshots will run in under 3 minutes).
• Chromatic - Visual testing and UI review for component libraries. Cloud-based. Video
• Micoostars154 - Open source service for all UI application visual regression solution
• Creeveystars320 - Cross-browser visual testing with magic. Feature-rich tool with UI Runner, Tests Hot Reloading, Docker and Storybook integration.
• Visual regression testing for Hugo with Github-CI and BackstopJS - How to automate regression testing for Hugo with BackstopJS
• Karma - A test runner by the AngularJS team, that fits all our needs.
• Selenidestars1.6k - Framework powered by Selenium WebDriver for writing easy-to-read and easy-to-maintain automated tests in Java.
• theheadless.dev - Blog with practical guides and runnable examples on Playwright and Puppeteer.
• PhantomFlowstars688 - Experimental approach to UI testing, based on Decision Trees.
• Visual Reviewstars280 - A human-friendly tool for testing and reviewing visual regressions.
• Huxleystars4.1k - Python framework based on Selenium Webdriver.
• WebdriverCSSstars626 - WebdriverCSS sits on top of Webdriver.iostars7.7k and hooks into Seleniumstars24.9k.
• Geministars1.5k - Feature rich framework with support for Seleniumstars24.9k and CasperJSstars7.3k. Gemini is deprecated, use hermione instead.
• OcularJSstars7 - uses PhantomJSstars29k.
• Visual Regression Trackerstars442 - Open Source selfhosted service for visual regression testing
• Playwrightstars43.3k - Node library to automate Chromium, Firefox and WebKit with a single API.
• wdio-visual-regressionstars3 - Visual regression tool for webdriver.io
• Automatic visual diffing with Puppeteer
• Automated screenshot comparison tests with headless Chrome, Puppeteer and Pixelmatch, in Bitbucket pipeline
• Diffy - Cloud based visual regression tool. Uses puppeteer and proprietary comparison algorithm (detect layout shifts). Great scalability with AWS Lambda.
• Reflect - Visual regression testing and test automation tool.
• basset - Open source platform for generating and reviewing visual differences. Supports multiple browsers, integrations for github and slack.
• qd_screenshottests - CasperJS-based UI regression and functional testing focused on Drupal 8 sites.
• Vidiff - Cloud-based visual regression testing across stages.
• LambdaTest - Perform Automated and Live Interactive Cross Browser Testing on 2000+ Real Browsers and Operating Systems Online.
• Visual Regression Test with WebdriverIO & WebdriverCSS - Tutorial using WebdriverIO and WebdriverCSS with Spec Reporter
• test-crawlerstars21 - Visual regression testing, by crawling a website and providing snapshot comparison reports.
• Fluxguard - Screenshot pixel and DOM change comparisons and regressions.
• Axcept - Testing for the whole team. Up to 100 tests in parallel. Endpoint Mocking. Code Coverage.
• jest-puppeteer-reactstars66 - Visual regression testing with Jest and puppeteer for React components
• Keeping a React Design System consistent: using visual regression testing to save time and headaches - Using percy, and jest puppeteer to visually test a React component library.
• dpxdtstars1.4k - End-to-end testing with Python.
• Visual Knight - Cloud-based visual testing platform with realtime results for testing tools.
• AyeSpystars169 - 44 image comparisons in 90 seconds.
• Happostars506 - Visual diffing in CI for user interfaces.
• Wendigostars136 - Test-oriented browser automation library based on Puppeteer.
• Lokistars1.5k - Visual regression testing for Storybook using Chrome in docker et al.
• CodeceptJSstars3.8k - Modern Era Acceptance Testing Framework for NodeJS.
• FuncUnitstars570 - A functional test suite based on jQuery
• Nightwatchstars11.2k - Automated testing and continuous integration framework based on Node.js and using the Webdriver protocol.
• Protractorstars8.8k - E2E test framework for Angular apps.
• PhantomJSstars29k - Scriptable Headless WebKit. No longer maintained since 2 June 2018.
• Happo - Cloud-based screenshot testing service with support for multiple browsers.
• Zombie.js - Insanely fast, headless full-stack testing using Node.js.
• reg-clistars274 - Visual regression test tool which output easy-to-read single file html report.
• CSS Regression Testing with Wraith - Screencast: Basic introduction to wraith, a screenshot comparison tool.
• ember-visual-teststars24 - Simple visual regression testing for Ember.
• AETstars118 - Scalable testing tool providing visual regression testing, accessibility and performance validation, markup analysis and more.
• Visual Regression Testing - from a tool to a process by Nikhil Verma - How the Mobile Web team in Badoo converted and integrated PhantomCSS into their workflow and connected it to their CI process.
• Visual Regression Testing with Puppeteer & Jest - Tutorial to setup visual testing with Puppeteer, Jest and VisWiz.io.
• Muppeteerstars66 - Visual regression testing framework for Chrome using Mocha and Puppeteerstars80.3k.
• VisWiz.io - Flexible visual regression testing service.
• PhantomCSSstars4.7k - Visual/CSS regression testing with PhantomJS or SlimerJS. No longer maintained since 22 Dec 2017.
• ResembleJSstars4.2k - Analyse and compare images with Javascript and HTML5.
• DalekJSstars705 - Automated cross browser testing with JavaScript. No longer maintained since 4 Jun 2017.
• Look-alikestars27 - Chrome Extension for taking and comparing screenshots.
• Differencifystars609 - A library for visual regression testing using Puppeteerstars80.3k.
• Make visual regression testing easier - Introduction to Differencifystars609 and how to use it.
• Chimpstars785 - Develop acceptance tests & end-to-end tests with realtime feedback.
• reg-suitstars932 - Visual regression testing suite which compares images, stores snapshots, and notifies the difference to your GitHub repo.
• Cypress.io - An automation framework that runs in-browser.
• Puppeteerstars80.3k - Headless Google Chrome Node API.
• Visual Regression Testing with Shoov - How to setup shoov and get your first test written.
• Visual Regression Testing with PhantomCSS - Talk by Jon Bellah on how to use PhantomCSS during wordpress development.
• Visual Regression Testing: Sanity Checks With BackstopJS - Screencast with code demo and best practices.
• Screenster Tutorial - Tutorial on how to create visual automated tests with Screenster.
• Look-alike - visual regression testing tool - Demo what the Look-alike Chrome extension is, how it works and how and why it was build.
• Screencast on CSS critic - a lightweight testing framework for CSS - How to write your first CSS test with CSS critic, make it pass, break it, and make it pass again.
• Seleniumstars24.9k - Browser automation framework and ecosystem.
• SlimerJSstars3k - Scriptable browser like PhantomJS, based on Firefox.
• Webdriver.iostars7.7k - Node.js bindings implementation for the W3C WebDriver protocol.
• gatlingstars52 - Integrated visual RSpec matcher which makes real visual testing easy (Ruby).
• vrteststars11 - JavaScript library for running visual regression tests on your components cross browser via selenium.
• BrowserStack - Free for Open Source. Supports Selenium Webdriver.
• screener.io - For React, looks open source.
• applitools - Cloud base visual tests.
• percy.io - Continuous visual reviews for web apps.
• screenster.io - Cloud based automation testing platform for web and mobile UI.
• browserling - LIVE interactive cross-browser testing.
• Browser Shots - Screenshots only.
• Ghost Inspector - See introduction video.
• CrossBrowserTesting - Manual & exploratory testing on 1500+ real browsers and mobile devices.
• Argos-CI - Automate visual regression testing.
• Phillip Gourley: Making visual regression useful - Why you should use BackstopJS.
• Pavels Jelisejevs: Visual Regression Testing with PhantomCSS - Introduction to PhantomCSS.
• Chromeless, Chrominator, Chromy, Navalia, Lambdium, GhostJS, AutoGCD - Headless Chrome is shaking up traditional approaches to test automation.
• Nightmarestars19.3k - High-level browser automation library based on Electron.
• Chromelessstars13.2k - Chrome automation made simple. Runs locally or headless on AWS Lambda.
• trifleJSstars820 - Headless automation for Internet Explorer.
• CasperJSstars7.3k - Navigation scripting and testing utility for PhantomJS and SlimerJS.
• Navaliastars952 - Browser Automation based on headless Chrome and GraphQL.
• Wraithstars4.8k - Easy to use ruby tool with docker support.
• BackstopJSstars6.2k - Config-driven automated screenshot test framework.
• Galenstars1.4k - Java framework based on Seleniumstars24.9k.
• CSSCriticstars475 - Lightweight CSS regression testing.
• Spectrestars453 - Provides image comparison capabilities and an admin interface for managing screenshots.
• Shoovstars31 - UI regression and functional testing focused on Drupal 7 sites.
• Hardystars320 - Selenium-driven, cucumber-powered CSS testing.
• TestCafestars9.4k - Automated browser testing for the modern web development stack.
• Needlestars580 - Needle is a tool for testing visuals with Selenium and nose (Python).
• grunt-photoboxstars269 - Plugin to prevent your project of broken layout via screenshot photo sessions of your site.
• Kevin Lamping: The 5 best visual regression testing tools - Compares: Wraith, PhantomCSS, Gemini, WebdriverCSS and Spectre.
• Garris Shipon: Visual Regression Testing For Angular Applications - Tutorial using BackstopJS.
• Angela Riggs: Visual Regression Testing with BackstopJS - Tutorial using BackstopJS.
• Garris Shipon: Automating CSS Regression Testing - Tutorial using BackstopJS.
• Wikipedia: Regression testing
• Survey of screenshot-based CSS testing tools
